country.name: Hong Kong
country.buy: heritage bakery gifts, Hong Kong design objects and transport miniatures
country.chinese_buy: 传统饼食礼盒、香港设计小物与交通模型
country.tip: Buy fragile egg rolls near the end of the trip, and visit Central Market or PMQ for independent local-design labels.
country.chinese_tip: 易碎蛋卷建议在行程后段购买；中环街市和PMQ适合寻找本地独立设计品牌。
country.shopping_location: Central Market, PMQ, Causeway Bay, Mong Kok and Hong Kong International Airport.

products.name: G.O.D. Hong Kong Festive Skyline foldable shopping bag
products.note: It folds into its zip wallet, so it takes almost no luggage space.
products.chinese_name: G.O.D.香港节庆天际线折叠购物袋
products.description: A reusable foldable tote printed with G.O.D.'s colourful Hong Kong skyline artwork.
products.why_buy: G.O.D. turns local visual culture—skyline, neon, taxis and harbour life—into genuinely usable design.
products.typical_overseas_price: About US$40–55 when imported, if stocked.
products.savings: Buying in Hong Kong avoids import mark-ups and gives access to local-only prints.
products.best_shops: G.O.D. Central flagship, PMQ and selected design retailers.
products.online_availability: Official G.O.D. web store ships selected products internationally.

photos.alt_text: G.O.D. Hong Kong Festive Skyline foldable shopping bag

reviews.body: A thoughtful Hong Kong gift with local character; it was easy to carry home.

products.name: Kee Wah Bakery classic egg roll gift box
products.note: Keep the tin flat in hand luggage; the rolls are delicate.
products.chinese_name: 奇华饼家经典蛋卷礼盒
products.description: A Hong Kong-made gift tin of thin, crisp butter egg rolls in classic and regional flavours.
products.why_buy: Kee Wah has been part of Hong Kong baking culture since 1938, and the sealed gift tin is easy to share.
products.savings: Buying locally gives fresher stock, more flavours and Hong Kong-only packaging.
products.best_shops: Kee Wah branches, IFC Mall, Citygate and Hong Kong International Airport.
products.airport_availability: Yes, including airport outlets; check terminal stock.
products.online_availability: Official Kee Wah e-shop and selected overseas distributors.

photos.alt_text: Kee Wah Bakery classic egg roll gift box

reviews.body: A thoughtful Hong Kong gift with local character; it was easy to carry home.

products.name: TINY City 32 Hong Kong Tram model
products.note: Keep the small parts and packaging in your carry-on.
products.chinese_name: TINY City 32 香港电车模型
products.description: A detailed 1/120 die-cast replica of an iconic Hong Kong double-decker tram.
products.why_buy: It is an officially licensed, distinctly local collectible rather than a generic toy-car souvenir.
products.typical_overseas_price: About US$15–25 from overseas specialist sellers.
products.savings: Local stores offer the widest selection of routes, liveries and limited editions.
products.best_shops: TINY at The Peak, Central Market and selected malls.
products.airport_availability: Limited; buy in town for choice.
products.online_availability: TINY Hong Kong e-shop and specialist model retailers.

photos.alt_text: TINY City 32 Hong Kong Tram model

reviews.body: A thoughtful Hong Kong gift with local character; it was easy to carry home.

products.name: The Lion Rock Press Hong Kong Central postcard
products.note: Buy a small set and mail one from Hong Kong while keeping the rest.
products.chinese_name: 狮子山出版社香港中环明信片
products.description: An illustrated keepsake postcard celebrating the architecture and streetscape of Central.
products.why_buy: It is affordable, flat-packed and made by a local studio focused on Hong Kong stories and bilingual gifts.
products.savings: Local pickup is cheaper and lets you browse the full city-themed series.
products.best_shops: The Lion Rock Press showroom in Sheung Wan and selected museum/design shops.
products.online_availability: Official Lion Rock Press online store offers international delivery.

photos.alt_text: The Lion Rock Press Hong Kong Central postcard

reviews.body: A thoughtful Hong Kong gift with local character; it was easy to carry home.

products.name: The Wax Can egg tart scented candle
products.note: Wrap carefully and keep it upright; check airline rules for candles.
products.chinese_name: The Wax Can 蛋挞味香薰蜡烛
products.description: A Hong Kong handmade, egg-tart-shaped candle with a warm buttery bakery scent.
products.why_buy: It captures a famous Hong Kong flavour in an inventive, locally made home fragrance.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually unavailable overseas; international shipping varies.
products.savings: The local shop has the freshest stock and the widest Hong Kong-themed scent range.
products.best_shops: The Wax Can shops and selected Central Market retailers.
products.airport_availability: No; buy before going to the airport.
products.online_availability: Official The Wax Can online store; shipping destinations vary.

photos.alt_text: The Wax Can egg tart scented candle

reviews.body: A thoughtful Hong Kong gift with local character; it was easy to carry home.

products.name: Kee Wah Bakery almond cookie gift tin
products.note: Choose a sealed tin for easier packing.
products.description: Buttery, crumbly almond cookies in a classic Hong Kong bakery gift presentation.
products.why_buy: Kee Wah and Wing Wah are established choices for polished, shareable Hong Kong pastry gifts.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often unavailable overseas or sold at an import premium.
products.savings: Buying in Hong Kong gives the widest local selection and avoids import mark-ups.
products.best_shops: Kee Wah Bakery and Wing Wah branches; major malls and airport shops.
products.airport_availability: Yes, at selected airport bakery outlets.
products.online_availability: Official bakery shops and selected overseas distributors.

products.name: Hang Heung wife cake gift box
products.note: Buy close to departure for best texture.
products.description: Flaky pastries filled with sweet winter-melon paste, one of Hong Kong’s classic bakery souvenirs.
products.why_buy: Kee Wah and Hang Heung make it easy to take this much-loved Cantonese pastry home in a gift box.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often unavailable overseas or sold at an import premium.
products.savings: Buying in Hong Kong gives the widest local selection and avoids import mark-ups.
products.best_shops: Hang Heung, Kee Wah and selected traditional bakeries.
products.airport_availability: Selected airport bakery outlets; stock varies.
products.online_availability: Limited official online availability; freshness is best in Hong Kong.

products.name: Lee Kum Kee premium XO sauce
products.note: Check destination food-import rules before packing.
products.description: A rich savoury condiment built around dried seafood, chilli and umami flavours.
products.why_buy: Lee Kum Kee is a Hong Kong-founded pantry brand, while local delis offer more premium regional variations.
products.typical_overseas_price: Often unavailable overseas or sold at an import premium.
products.savings: Buying in Hong Kong gives the widest local selection and avoids import mark-ups.
products.best_shops: Lee Kum Kee shops, supermarkets, Yau Sang Cheong and food halls.
products.airport_availability: Often available in duty-free or food-gift shops.
products.online_availability: Widely available, but local editions and pricing are usually better.

products.name: On Kee dried seafood selection
products.note: Vacuum-pack and check customs restrictions before buying.
products.description: Premium dried scallops, abalone and other dried seafood used in Cantonese festive cooking.
products.why_buy: It is a high-value, deeply local culinary gift for travellers who cook or have family kitchens to supply.

products.best_shops: On Kee and established dried-seafood shops in Sheung Wan.

products.online_availability: Specialist delivery is available, subject to destination rules.

products.name: Hong Kong bird’s nest gift set
products.note: Buy from a reputable specialist and verify origin labels.
products.description: A premium Chinese wellness-food gift sold in graded nests or ready-to-serve formats.

products.name: Hong Kong gold jewellery piece
